message:
Fix eigenvalue sort order to match NumPy ascending convention

NumPy's linalg.eigh / eigvalsh return eigenvalues in ascending order.
Our batch_eigvalsh (fnp-linalg) and eigh (fnp-ufunc) tests were
asserting descending order, which would pass only by accident when
the implementation happened to return them that way.

Update tests in both crates to assert ascending eigenvalue order and
add an explicit monotonicity check (vals[0] <= vals[1]) so any future
regression in sort order is caught immediately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
